name: Wonderful Fate
overview: Li Fuzhu, a struggling but clever student, accidentally enters the cartoon world of Yun Lai Country, where she is mistaken for a heavenly savior. Treated as an equal to the powerless Emperor Yun Yi, she tries to help the country prosper but gets caught in a power struggle with the ambitious National Master. Along the way, she discovers the dangers of ignorance and the true value of knowledge.

trailers.title: Official Trailer: Wonderful Fate | 奇妙的命运呀 | iQiyi
